slots.description: Full-bleed hero background. Completed roof, real job site. Minimum 1440x900px.
Before photo of a real completed job. Labeled with city + service type.
After photo matching before-1. Same project.
Founder headshot. Square crop preferred. Natural light. No suits.

fallback_strategy: All image slots have CSS-driven placeholder backgrounds. The site renders without photos; real photos replace placeholders at Stage 4.
